content: @Eryk Kulikowski hi! I was just looking at https://github.com/rclone/rclone/pull/9467 (thanks for that PR!) after watching your presentation again.

I'm a little confused by this comment by Nick Craig-Wood:

"As you noted we have a doi backend https://rclone.org/doi/ with a dataverse provider already. Why can't this be a patch to the doi backend?"

Yes, Dataverse supports DOIs. But Dataverse also supports Handles and Permalinks as alternatives to DOIs.

Yes, exactly. That is why I added a new backend first. My pr adds full support to all PID types, so for Dataverse, the DOI backend is more than just DOI, it also supports handle, and any other PID. If you like to keep the Dataverse separated from DOI backend (it could be missed easily by people looking for a way to moount a dataset as it is not clearly Dataverse in the name), please leave a comment in the PR. This would help to convince Nick.
Thanks, I left a comment at https://github.com/rclone/rclone/pull/9467#issuecomment-4803144295 and invited him to join us here.
